name: Trace Viewer
description: Agent execution trace viewer for inspecting request waterfalls, step timelines, and replaying agent interactions with full observability.

page_briefs.traces: Data table of execution traces with columns for trace ID (monospace), agent name, duration bar, step count, status icon (success/error/timeout), and timestamp. Filter bar with status toggles, date range picker, and agent name search. Rows clickable to drill into detail.
page_briefs.trace-detail: Full trace waterfall visualization at top showing nested spans as horizontal bars on a time axis, color-coded by type (LLM call, tool invocation, internal step). Below, an agent timeline with chronological step cards showing input/output pairs, token counts, and latency per step. Replay controls at top-right for stepping through the execution.

shells.sidebar-main: Collapsible sidebar with trace filters and main content area
